series_metadata.series_description: The series consists of the Request of Employer for Separation, the employers Notice of Determination of Benefit Rights, Board of Review decision, and any other unemployment related documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for at least three (3) years and destroy when no longer of value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for at least three (3) years and destroy when no longer of value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
